creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Without adding openssl to BUILD_DEPENDS/RUN_DEPENDS/LDFLAGS misc/hashdb fails in the poudriere VM 12.0-RELEASE-p3 with this error:
> checking for openssl/x509.h... yes
> checking for EVP_get_digestbyname in -lcrypto... yes
> checking for SSL_library_init in -lssl... no
> configure: error: Could not find ssl library
